entries.summary: Completed confirmation decision: B7 was screening-negative, no pre-registration or confirmatory LOOCV was created, and the candidate was closed with a negative-result evidence artifact.
top_rejection_reasons: results/ decision artifact write was blocked by scope/tool-layer mismatch, so closure was recorded in .swarm evidence.
lessons_learned: For screening-negative candidates, recording a clear negative decision is the finish line; do not spend lockbox budget on LOOCV.
When results/ writes are blocked, .swarm evidence artifacts can preserve decision provenance.
Reviewer and test_engineer checks are still useful for non-code scientific decision artifacts.
